nodes.label: System architecture overview
nodes.description: HTTP daemon with encryption, storage backends, metadata index, sessions

nodes.label: PUT request flow
nodes.description: auth -> lock -> encapsulate -> HKDF -> seal -> write -> index -> 201

nodes.label: 28-byte envelope header
nodes.description: magic + format_ver + kem_alg + aead_alg + nonce + plaintext_len

nodes.label: Per-object key derivation
nodes.description: ML-KEM encapsulate -> HKDF-SHA256 -> AES-256-GCM content key

nodes.label: Secret-key wrapping
nodes.description: Argon2id KEK wraps SK under AES-256-GCM, zeroized on drop

nodes.label: Argon2id parameters
nodes.description: m_cost_kib=65536 t_cost=3 p_cost=4 OWASP second-tier

nodes.label: pubkey.json schema
nodes.description: kem_alg ml-kem-768, public_key_b64, fingerprint_sha256

nodes.label: UserRecord format
nodes.description: username, timestamps, kdf params + salt, wrapped SK nonce+ciphertext

nodes.label: .obj on-disk layout
nodes.description: 64B header + N data + M metadata JSON + 64B trailer with CRC32

nodes.label: LockRegistry
nodes.description: lock-free papaya HashMap, per-object, vanishes on process exit

nodes.label: Best-effort flusher
nodes.description: flume channel, background dedup fdatasync, timer/watermark wake

nodes.label: DashMap session store
nodes.description: in-memory token_hash to SessionInfo, background sweeper, no persistence

nodes.label: Login lockout
nodes.description: consecutive failures trigger lockout, timing floor 250ms

nodes.label: Idle keystore drop
nodes.description: drop SK after last session expires via keystore_idle_drop_seconds

nodes.label: Daemon flock
nodes.description: exclusive POSIX flock on keystore .lock prevents dual-keystore

nodes.label: Threat model
nodes.description: defends disk theft credential theft quantum; not compromised daemon client TLS replay

nodes.label: Prometheus metrics
nodes.description: storage ops counters, duration histograms, auth logins gauge, active sessions

nodes.label: Per-request X-Request-ID
nodes.description: UUID propagated through tracing spans and SSE trace stream

nodes.description: envelope.rs kdf.rs keystore.rs user_store.rs storage format.rs locks.rs index.rs
